dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend EventId = tostring(event.id), EventType = tostring(event.type), Module = tostring(event.module), RiskLevel = tostring(event.risk_level), AssetType = coalesce(tostring(event.asset.type), tostring(event.source_type), ''), AssetValue = coalesce(tostring(event.asset.value), tostring(event.asset_value), ''), Tags = event.tags, TimeGenerated = coalesce(todatetime(event.date_added), todatetime(event.detected_at), todatetime(time), now()), Details = bag_remove_keys(event, dynamic(['id','type','module','risk_level','is_resolved','date_added','tags','asset','asset_value','detected_at','source_type'])) | project TimeGenerated, EventId, EventType, Module, RiskLevel, AssetType, AssetValue, Tags, Details
